name: Bank Of Queensland Limited.
analysis: BOQ's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.2900, stop A$5.8509, target A$7.2550 (2.20:1) — then trail it.
